purpose: Target-user Director-quality gate. Blocks BETA ENABLEMENT (not the Phase-7 engineering merge). Valid schema-conformant JSON is NOT proof of good editing. Frozen before the first rating result; any change to sample table, procedure, or thresholds requires a NEW evaluationVersion and a FULL rerun — never a reinterpretation of existing results.

secondaryTagMinimums.note: Attributes of the SAME 16 recordings — satisfied by assignment, never by adding recordings (no double-counting).

procedure.groundTruthAdjudicator: one senior adjudicator, NOT a rater, establishes the correct removal/keep spans from the source BEFORE seeing Director output
procedure.actionMatchTolerance: a Director removal is a true positive iff it is contained in, or has IoU >= 0.5 with, a ground-truth removal span
procedure.consent: target-user recordings; shared with task #115 corpus; consented

removalPrecision.denominator: all Director removal actions in scope

harmfulCuts.definition: any Director removal overlapping a ground-truth KEEP (content-bearing) span by > 0 ms

wouldShip.definition: fraction of recordings where >= 2 of 3 raters answer 'a creator would ship this edit'
wouldShip.note: At N=16 a Wilson 95% lower bound >= 0.70 is only met at 15/16 (LCB ~0.717); 14/16 gives LCB ~0.640. The operative HARD RULE is therefore >= 15/16, not 13/16.

outcomeRules.PASS: all metrics meet thresholds AND all minimum denominators satisfied
outcomeRules.INCONCLUSIVE: removal-action denominator below minimum (overall or any duration stratum), or reserves exhausted before N=16 ratable recordings — NEVER counted as a pass
outcomeRules.FAIL: any harmful cut, precision below threshold/LCB, would-ship < 15/16, or kappa < 0.60
outcomeRules.disagreementHandling: per-action verdict by 2/3 majority; a tie is treated as NOT acceptable (conservative)
outcomeRules.missingHandling: unratable/corrupt/no-speech/provider-error recordings are excluded and replaced from reserves (logged); if reserves exhaust, outcome is INCONCLUSIVE
outcomeRules.immutability: any change to this file or the rubric requires a new evaluationVersion + full rerun; existing results are never reinterpreted
